title: Guangxi makes all-out rescue, relief efforts after rain-triggered disasters
summary: Guangxi makes all-out rescue, relief efforts after rain-triggered disasters

fullArticle:
Rescuers take turns to rest in Guigang City, south China's Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region, July 8, 2026. Recent extreme rainstorms triggered by Typhoon Maysak, the 10th typhoon of the year, have caused severe flooding in parts of Guangxi in the Pearl River basin.

Guangxi is continuing its search and rescue operations for missing persons, enhancing resettlement services for affected residents and advancing post-disaster reconstruction. (Xinhua/Cao Yiming)

Rescuers deliver relief supplies to local residents in Napeng Town of Qinzhou City, south China's Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region, July 8, 2026. Recent extreme rainstorms triggered by Typhoon Maysak, the 10th typhoon of the year, have caused severe flooding in parts of Guangxi in the Pearl River basin.
